name: Iso11783OPChangeFillAttribute
title: Iso11783OPChangeFillAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783OPChangeFillAttribute( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword color, dword type, dword patternID );
description: The function changes the properties of a fill attribute object. A Change Fill Attribute command is sent to the Virtual Terminal.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

parameters.name: objectID
parameters.description: Object ID of a fill attribute object

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Fill type: 0: do not fill 1: fill with line color 2: fill with fill color 3: fill with pattern from patternID

parameters.name: patternID
parameters.description: Object ID of a picture object, which is used as fill pattern

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
